params.name: Ark Reactor
params.source:
* Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.36%)
* [[Altar#Gods_of_the_Pantheon|God of Technology]] Descent
params.description:
On Aug 2, 1962, a virtual device used to sustain life was produced and used for the first time.

The Ark Reactor is a portable nuclear fusion reactor. By bombarding the nucleus of an atom with high-energy particles, it can reach a high temperature in an instant and release a huge amount of energy by making nuclear fusion in a vacuum. This small device uses clean energy to release ultra-high energy. It has brought great development to mankind.
